title: Family mourns baby after Israeli forces blocked journey to hospital
summary:
Family mourns baby after Israeli forces blocked journey to hospital

Three-month-old Ahmad Zaid’s family received his birth certificate and death certificate on the same day. He had been found unresponsive at home, but Israeli forces in the occupied West Bank blocked his way to the hospital. Al Jaze...

fullArticle:
Family mourns baby after Israeli forces blocked journey to hospital

Three-month-old Ahmad Zaid’s family received his birth certificate and death certificate on the same day. He had been found unresponsive at home, but Israeli forces in the occupied West Bank blocked his way to the hospital. Al Jazeera’s Leila Warah spoke to Ahmad’s family....
